历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 4921 → 4956 → 5650 → 6060 → 7158, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2200 positions in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7158, showing a clear backward trend. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment for science (physics category) was 281 → 277 → 279 → 279 → 287 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 299, an increase of about 12 students (+4.2%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, but the effect is limited.
3. [School Level] 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (stable in the 23-27 range in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue investigated for academic misconduct), in 2025 the reputation was somewhat negative (a major gap in a Chongqing program), Douyin popularity ranking 85th (evaluation 'average'), overall exposure is low; in 2024, there were signals of admission gaps, but in 2025, the abnormal attention to filing was low; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, etc., highly related to enrollment majors, with strong strengths in medicine, computer science, materials, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other advantageous engineering majors at Central South University continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity; clinical medicine, stomatology and other medical majors are stable and hot; civil engineering and architecture are in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025 (472,480), intensifying competition slightly; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Jiangxi, belonging to the Central China region, with strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees; the university has a large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (about 280-300 in science), making it a major cross-provincial enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 2200 positions in the last 3 years), the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4.2% easing competition, the slight increase of about 0.5% in local examinees intensifying competition, the stable 985 level but somewhat negative reputation of the school, and the high social popularity of advantageous engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 7158, the expansion effect and the backward trend of rankings offset each other, and the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7368, with a range of 6868-7868.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 7368, range 6868-7868. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (6868) can focus on impacting Tier 1 programs such as Clinical Medicine Eight-Year, Stomatology 5+3, and Computer Science; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 7300) are advised to focus on Tier 2 programs such as Electronic Information, Automation, Software Engineering, and Mathematics, while also attempting Tier 1 programs; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (7868) are advised to use Tier 3 programs such as Materials, Chemical and Pharmaceutical, Civil Engineering, and Transportation as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 programs.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 892 → 878 → 824 → 1011 → 1113. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight forward shift (decreasing ranking number), while from 2024 to 2025, there was a significant backward shift, with a cumulative backward shift of about 289 places over the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1113. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment for liberal arts (history category) was 24 students each year. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 22 students, a reduction of 2 students (-8.3%) compared to 2025, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 27th, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (former president Zhang Yaoxue under investigation), and the 2025 reputation is somewhat negative (a major gap in a certain major in Chongqing). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (rated as 'average'). In 2024, there were signs of enrollment gaps, which have a certain negative impact on the psychology of liberal arts applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 A- or above disciplines. Liberal arts-related disciplines include Marxist Theory (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A-), with moderate relevance to liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but is clearly polarized. Chinese Language/Literature is recommended. Finance/Economics/Economy is polarized and wait-and-see. Foreign Languages and Literatures is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Jiangxi Province, estimated based on the recent proportion (approximately 43.6%), is about 207,000, basically the same as in 2025 (206,055). Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Jiangxi, and has strong regional appeal for Jiangxi liberal arts examinees. The liberal arts enrollment scale is relatively small (about 22-24 students), making competition relatively intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings over the last two years (cumulative about 289 places), the approximately 8.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the basically stable number of examinees in the province, the solid 985 level of the university but somewhat negative reputation, and the polarization of liberal arts major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1113, the combined effect of enrollment reduction and ranking backward trend is expected to cause a slight forward shift in ranking (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1037, with a range of 889-1185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Finance (Economics and Management Category) (International Economics and Trade, Finance, Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Digital Publishing)
- Digital Publishing (International Communication Excellence Talent Cultivation Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literatures (English, French, Japanese, Spanish).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 1037, with a range of 889-1185. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (889) can focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Law and Finance. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 1037) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like Chinese Language and Literature, while also attempting Tier 1 majors as a sprint. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (1185) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Foreign Languages and Literatures as a safety option, while also trying Tier 2 majors. With only 22 liberal arts enrollment spots, competition is fierce, so candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably.
